steps: Read the main text out loud. This is your practice time.
Record yourself reading: Record → Stop → Play it back, Clear it, or Download it.
Tap purple words to see the meaning and hear the word + definition.
Complete the worksheet in the worksheet section.

how-it-works.title: How This Works
content: Welcome! This book will help you become a confident reader.
Tap purple words to get a pop-up meaning.

neuroplasticity.definition: Your brain’s ability to change and grow as you learn.

worksheet.title: Quick Practice
worksheet.prompt: Write one sentence about what you think this book will help you do.

ch1.title: Chapter 1: Welcome to Your Reading Journey
content: Hello there! I am FluentBuddy, and I am so excited to begin this reading journey with you.
You connect new ideas to what you already know. This is called [[being engaged]].
Just like practice helps you improve in a game, [[engagement]] helps you become a stronger reader, thinker, and learner.

being engaged.definition: Being fully focused and involved while learning.
being engaged.simpleMeaning: Paying close attention and taking part when you learn.
being engaged.example: I am being engaged when I listen carefully and participate.

engagement.definition: Being fully focused and involved while learning.
engagement.simpleMeaning: Paying close attention and taking part when you learn.
engagement.example: I show engagement in class when I listen carefully and take part in activities.

items.label: Paraphrasing
items.prompt: Write the main idea of Chapter 1 in your own words.

items.label: Paraphrase the Example
items.prompt: Paraphrase this sentence in your own words: Reading is like exercise for your brain. The more you do it, the stronger your brain gets.
